commands.narrative:
## 2026-06-13 Daily Report

**Roster:** No changes since yesterday. 74 strategies enabled, 6 disabled. 80 total in roster.

**Headline:** Bot is HEALTHY on all four pipeline levels but recorded 0 shadow trades today — the last graduation was ~18 minutes before report time, which the diagnose pipeline flags as NO_GRADS (a transient quiet period, not a WS failure; all Levels 1–4 pass). Yesterday delivered 137 shadow trades.

### What accumulated vs. what bled

No new SOL moved today given the zero-trade window. Lifetime view: the top two strategies continue to lead on real SOL accumulation:

- **v9shadow-velmono-dev** (vel 20-50 + mono>0.5 + dev>5%, score **70.4**): n=109, total=**+3.181 SOL**, drop3=**+1.441 SOL**, monthly=**+2.24 SOL/mo**. Three of four promotion gates clear; monthly run rate is the only gap (needs 3.75, currently 2.24). Still a WATCH.
- **v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono** (vel 20-50 + liq>100 + mono>0.33, score **66.9**): n=121, total=**+2.844 SOL**, drop3=**+0.480 SOL** (thin but positive), monthly=**+2.09 SOL/mo**. Same situation — three gates clear, monthly gate open. Also a WATCH.
- **v24-rugger-climbing** (serial_rugger + climbing_t30_t45, score **70.7**): n=39, total=+2.787, drop3=+0.529. Highest composite score but far too few trades (needs 100). Rising — score up +14.3 points since 06-11 (56.4→70.7). WATCH.

No strategy is currently PROMOTABLE. The two closest (velmono-dev, velmid-liq-mono) need their monthly run rates to grow; the market has been slower this week which compresses the denominator.

### Score trend alert — velmono-dev dropped 16.9 points

The 7-day score history shows v9shadow-velmono-dev at **87.3 on 06-11 → 70.4 on 06-12** (−16.9 points). v9shadow-velmid-liq-mono was stable (67.7→66.9). A drop of this magnitude on the leading strategy is worth watching; the most likely cause is the monthly run-rate denominator expanding as time passes without new wins. No data quality flag on the row; leaving as WATCH pending another week of trades.

### Kill backlog: 8 action items unexecuted, losses continuing

Eight kill recommendations from sessions spanning 06-09 to 06-12 are all still PROPOSED. The market keeps executing trades against these strategies while the proposals sit. Most critically:

- **v52a-sm-shape** (HIT-KILL auto_status): n=167, total=**−3.833 SOL**, drop3=**−5.430 SOL**. The three most recent shadow trades for this strategy were all losses (−17.6%, −4.4%, −45.2%). Recommended for kill since 06-11. Every day it runs is more SOL drain.
- **v46-v25-green-only** (HIT-KILL): n=110, drop3=**−4.444 SOL** — also in the last 50 trades with a −14.8% timeout exit.
- **v35-vel2050-buyers-ratio**: n=97, total=**−6.941 SOL** (worst bleeder), drop3=**−8.603 SOL** — about to cross n=100 as hard INVALID.
- **V29.1**, **V31.5**, **v40-whale-cap**, **v40-acc-whale**: all HIT-KILL in journal, all deeply negative, all still running.

### New kill proposals (not in prior action items)

Two more strategies have reached INVALID territory without a prior kill recommendation:
- **v52d-sm-freshdev**: n=117, total=**−1.716 SOL**, drop3=**−3.360 SOL** — HIT-KILL in journal.
- **v35-vel2050-dev3**: n=104, total=**−2.965 SOL**, drop3=**−4.627 SOL** — HIT-KILL in journal.

### Bright spot: v55d-buyflow

v55 SM buy-flow magnitude is ON-TRACK in the journal (net_sol=+0.599, monthly=+4.713 SOL/mo if sustained) but only n=10 — far too early to draw conclusions. Worth watching as it builds toward the kill-criterion threshold.

### Operator next step

**Execute the kill batch.** Thirteen or more strategies have clear INVALID evidence and pending kill recommendations. Propose packaging the kills from action items ai-2026-06-11-001, ai-2026-06-12-001 plus the two new INVALID strategies (v52d, v35-vel2050-dev3) into a single strategy-commands.json push. This is the single highest-leverage action available — every day these strategies continue trading represents measurable SOL loss rather than research value.

anomalies.description: Last graduation detected ~18 minutes before report time; pipeline health flags NO_GRADS but all bot health levels 1-4 pass. Likely a transient quiet period on pump.fun.
Multiple shadow strategies flagged DEGRADING or HIT-KILL in journal. v52a-sm-shape (HIT-KILL, n=167) and v46-v25-green-only (HIT-KILL, n=110) still running and executing losing trades.
8 open action items (kill/watch/create) from 06-03 to 06-12 remain PROPOSED with no operator action. Loss accumulation on INVALID strategies is ongoing.
v9shadow-velmono-dev composite readiness score dropped 16.9 points (87.3→70.4) from 06-11 to 06-12. Likely monthly run-rate denominator expansion. No data quality flag; monitor.

patterns.description: velmono-dev and velmid-liq-mono recurring as top-2 accumulators for 5+ days — consistent positive drop3. Monthly run rate is the only remaining barrier, not data quality.

Kill backlog has grown to 8 items spanning 10 days (06-03 to 06-12) with zero operator executions. Pattern suggests operator is intentionally deferring; should either execute or formally DEFER each item to clear the backlog.

v24-rugger-climbing score has risen sharply over 7 days (35.8→56.4→70.7). The serial_rugger creator signal combined with climbing_t30_t45 momentum filter appears to be finding genuine edge in early trades. Watch closely as n approaches 60.

All strategies using BTC regime overlays (V30, V31 series) are accumulating losses uniformly. None have cleared drop3>0 with n>=100. Macro-regime gating on this timeframe appears to add noise rather than signal.

action_items.summary: Recommend killing v52d-sm-freshdev (n=117, drop3=−3.360 SOL INVALID) and v35-vel2050-dev3 (n=104, drop3=−4.627 SOL INVALID). Both are HIT-KILL in journal. Not covered by prior action items.

ESCALATION: Consolidate all pending kill recommendations into one batch. 13 strategies with clear INVALID evidence have proposals sitting unexecuted for 2–3 days. Recommend operator push a single strategy-commands.json deleting all 13 in one cycle.

commands.action_item_note: 10 days since proposal, v50-gini04-climbing not deployed. Deferring to clear backlog — can re-propose when operator is ready to deploy new strategies.
